---
title: "The relationship between Gross Domestic Product per capita and Life Expectancy."
author: "Emma Rand"
engine: knitr
format:
  html
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a
finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

```{r}
1 + 1
```

```{r}
hist(rnorm(100))
```
